mapper.select: SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT cs.section_id FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE c.course_code = #{courseId} AND sm.is_current = 1 AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND (#{division} IS NULL OR cs.section_no = #{division}) ORDER BY cs.section_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT ci.cart_id AS cart_item_id, c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, p.name AS professor, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, c.credits AS credit, ( SELECT LISTAGG(ss.day_of_week || ' ' || ss.start_time || '-' || ss.end_time, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time) FROM section_schedule ss WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS schedule, ( SELECT LISTAGG(cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no) FROM section_schedule ss JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS room, CASE WHEN COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) >= cs.capacity THEN 'FULL' WHEN cs.capacity - COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) <= 5 THEN 'CLOSING_SOON' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS seat_status, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_item ci2 WHERE ci2.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS scrapped, NULL AS conflict_with, CASE WHEN COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) < cs.capacity THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_applicable FROM cart_item ci JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = ci.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id WHERE ci.student_id = #{studentId} AND sm.is_current = 1 ORDER BY ci.added_at DESC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO cart_item ci USING ( SELECT #{studentId} AS student_id, #{sectionId} AS section_id FROM dual ) src ON (ci.student_id = src.student_id AND ci.section_id = src.section_id) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (student_id, section_id, added_at) VALUES (src.student_id, src.section_id, SYSTIMESTAMP)
